source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Other Lifting

actions_taken: Two injured personnel evacuated via med-evac to West Jefferson Hospital in New Orleans, LA
BSEE incident investigation initiated on November 3, 2020
Daily reports, photos, witness statements, work permits and procedures requested
event.summary: On October 31, 2020 at approximately 17:58 hours, a spider dog safety door (grating) fell through the rotary table to the top of the Blow Out Preventers (BOP) on the SeaDrill West Neptune drillship at Mississippi Canyon 503, Well #007, injuring two floor hands. The safety door was dislodged when spider dogs were functioned to the open position while back plates remained in the down position, causing bolts securing the grating to shear. The inadequate secondary retention chain failed to prevent the grating from falling into the well center. One injured person sustained facial lacerations and the other a fractured rib.

hazards.name: Dropped Object from Drill Floor Equipment
Mechanical Failure of Spider Dog Assembly
Personnel Working in Hazardous Area Below Suspended Load

threats.name: Back plates not raised to open position before spider dog operation
Bolts securing spider dog safety door sheared due to mechanical interference
Secondary retention chain inadequately designed to prevent fall toward well center
Communication failure between rig floor and moonpool personnel
Personnel not cleared from hazard zone before spider dog operation

consequences.name: Injury to personnel - facial lacerations and fractured rib
Loss of work time - evacuation and medical treatment
Damage to equipment - sheared bolts and grating
Potential loss of life from dropped object impact

controls.name: Spider Dog Safety Door Retention Chain
controls.barrier_role: Secondary retention to prevent grating from falling

supporting_text: Inadequate secondary retention chain for securing the grating on the riser spider

The chain was attached to the bracket (which secured the safety grating spider dog) and spider dog by one of the 4 bolts. The chain rapped around the spider dog and is designed to prevent the spider dog safety grating from falling away from the well center to the work platform while the dogs are in the open/vertical position. Since the chain was bolted to the bracket and the bolts were sheared, this allowed the grating to fall into the well center

Inadequate secondary safety for securing the spider dog safety door to the spider dog; the chain prevents the spider dog safety door from falling into the work platform area but does not retain the spider dog safety door from falling towards well center and to the moon pool

controls.name: Back Plate Position Check Before Spider Dog Operation
controls.barrier_role: Prevent mechanical interference with spider dog assembly
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to prevent bolt shearing

supporting_text: The back plate must be manually opened or placed in the up position before the dog is raised
The bolts were sheared off due to the back plate remaining in the down position and not in the open position on the work platform
The two bolts that secured the spider dog safety door were sheared off due to the back plates not being raised on the work platform
The night tour auxiliary driller went to the spider and raised all 4 back plates

controls.name: Standard Operating Manual Procedures
controls.barrier_role: Ensure proper sequencing and safety protocols for spider dog operation

supporting_text: Standard Operating Manual was not followed by the rig floor by personnel
Regulation (30 CFR 250.107a) Standard Operating Manual procedures were not followed

controls.name: Communication Protocol Between Rig Floor and Moonpool Personnel
controls.barrier_role: Ensure personnel are cleared from hazard zone before equipment operation
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control for personnel safety coordination

supporting_text: Communication failure between the rig floor personnel and the moonpool personnel
Communication failure between the rig floor and the moonpool personnel which didn't allow personnel to clear the moonpool before operating spider dogs above them

controls.name: Personal Protective Equipment - Safety Harness and Personal Flotation Device
controls.barrier_role: Prevent fatality and reduce severity of injury from dropped object
controls.lod_basis: Personal protective equipment for fall protection

supporting_text: The two floor hands donned safety harnesses and personal flotation devices
The rig personnel scaled the BOP to assist the two floor hands as they were suspended from their self-retracting lifelines

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
